info: Marks a module as compatible with generalized exosuit mounting logic.
Marks a module as fitting paired arm exosuit mounts.
Marks a module as fitting exosuit foot mounts.
Marks a module as exclusive to field exosuit special hardpoints.
Marks a module as exclusive to hazard exosuit special hardpoints.
Marks a module as fitting exosuit head mounts.

Marks a module as fitting paired leg exosuit mounts.
Marks a module as fitting exosuit mouth or respirator mounts.
Marks a module as exclusive to recon exosuit special hardpoints.
Marks a module as fitting exosuit torso mounts.
Marks a module as fitting exosuit utility mounts.
